reportedIssues: Several content rows are clipped on the right edge of the screen. The third game card in multiple rows is only partially visible, and the top category item shows only part of the label, such as “Hot Ga…”. This may be intentional carousel behavior, but visually it looks like the page is overflowing horizontally.
The fixed bottom navigation bar overlaps the game content near the bottom of the screen, partially covering the last visible row of game tiles.
The category navigation row near the top appears horizontally cut off, with the “Hot Games” pill partially visible and truncated at the right edge.
Some small overlay icons, especially the black circular “i” info icons on game tiles, may be hard to see against dark or busy game artwork.

expected.reasoning: None of the reported issues describe a Jackpots category being highlighted incorrectly; the reports focus on layout clipping, navigation overlap, and accessibility of icons.
